description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a hip roof and a prominent brick chimney on one side. The exterior walls are clad in light brown brick, and the roof is covered with dark shingles. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front facade, providing ample natural light and a modern aesthetic. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn bordered by a concrete base. The rear and side facades are more solid, with fewer and smaller windows, emphasizing privacy. The front entrance is marked by a small concrete step leading up to the main door, sheltered by the roof overhang.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a hip roof, large front windows, and a prominent chimney, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing large floor-to-ceiling windows and a small concrete step leading to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid brick wall with minimal windows and the chimney extending above the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid brick wall and a small window near the roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the roof overhang.
